name: BB:UBA : Insecure Ports
notes: Edit this BB to include all UBA insecure ports.
bb_references: BB:UBA : Insecure Ports on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the destination port is one of the following 0
when any of Destination Port are contained in any of UBA : Ports Of Authorized Protocols - Port

when a flow or an event matches any of the following BB:PortDefinition: Authorized L2R Ports, BB:PortDefinition: BGP Ports, BB:PortDefinition: DHCP Ports, BB:PortDefinition: DNS Ports, BB:PortDefinition: FTP OverTSL/SSL Ports, BB:PortDefinition: FTP Ports, BB:PortDefinition: LDAP Ports, BB:PortDefinition: Mail Ports, BB:PortDefinition: SNMP Ports, BB:PortDefinition: SSH Ports, BB:PortDefinition: Syslog Ports, BB:PortDefinition: Telnet Ports, BB:PortDefinition: TFTP Ports, BB:PortDefinition: Web Ports, BB:PortDefinition: Windows Ports
TD_list: APPLY BB:UBA : Insecure Ports on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND NOT when the destination port is one of the following 0
AND NOT when any of Destination Port are contained in any of UBA : Ports Of Authorized Protocols - Port
